title: new column type suggestion
excerpt: This is a request for a new column type selection, either like status or dropdown, but with a display text and a value for each option. This is for use primarily with integrations where in monday we need a friendly name …

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a request for a new column type selection, either like status or dropdown, but with a display text and a value for each option. This is for use primarily with integrations where in monday we need a friendly name but in a backend there is need for another value.

This way obtuse backend values XXS$123 can become “Wash & Wax” for integration purposes.
